title: Momonosuke Becomes Shogun
description: On pages 6–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Yamato, Unknown person #5, Marines, Luffy, Unknown person #6 as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
